flags: All 5 cluster excerpts already had multi-section §-anchored verbatim quotes from a prior Phase 2 pass — meeting the deepening bar (#abstract + the load-bearing equations: Kaplan eq 1.1-1.5/2.1, Chinchilla eq 2-4 + Tables 2/3, Snell eq 1, μP Table 3 + Def 4.1).
